signals.headline: Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Warsh Nomination Delays | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Powell Confirms He Will Remain Fed Chair Until Successor Confirmed Amid Warsh Nomination Delays | NO | HIGH confidence**

Jerome Powell stated he will serve as chair pro tem until a successor is confirmed by the Senate, per federal law and precedent, as his term ends May 15.[1][3][4] This follows a Fed meeting where he also affirmed no intention to leave the board until a criminal investigation in

Elon Musk Tweet Count Markets Trending on Polymarket | NO | LOW confidence**
